# Foundry (SaaS Maker)

> Foundry is Sarthak Agrawal's personal product fleet — twenty-something shipped apps plus the open-source operating layer (CLI, cockpit, deploy tooling) that runs them.

Static showcase at sassmaker.com. Apps live on their own custom domains; this site is the fleet map and case studies.

## Product

- [Home](https://sassmaker.com/): Fleet showcase and product inventory
- [Fleet performance case study](https://sassmaker.com/case-study/fleet-performance): How 23 sites were pushed toward sub-500ms desktop LCP p75
- [Privacy](https://sassmaker.com/privacy): Privacy policy for this showcase site
- [Terms](https://sassmaker.com/terms): Terms of use

## Fleet apps (custom domains)

- [Cockpit](https://app.sassmaker.com): Operator dashboard for fleet tasks and deploys
- [Documentation](https://docs.sassmaker.com): Foundry manual and stack notes
- [CodeVetter](https://codevetter.com): AI code review desktop app
- [High Signal](https://highsignal.app): Daily market and startup brief
- [RolePatch](https://rolepatch.com): Resume tailoring
- [Significant Hobbies](https://significanthobbies.com): Hobby timelines
- [Aliveville](https://aliveville.com): AI world game
- [Portfolio](https://sarthakagrawal.dev): Builder home page

## Optional

- [GitHub — saas-maker](https://github.com/sass-maker/saas-maker): Monorepo source
- [Launch kit](https://github.com/sass-maker/saas-maker/blob/main/docs/launch-kit.md): Distribution copy for Show HN, directories, and DR work
